testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 Carousel UI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal. kitaboo.com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02 Carousel FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoringShould redirect to New Activity creation page
testcases.raw: TC_03 Carousel FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoringShould redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to add Generic step
testcases.expected: Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step
testcases.raw: TC_04 Carousel FunctionalityVerify if user is able to add Generic step 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step User Should able add Generic step

testcases.description: Verify if user able to enter the step title
testcases.expected: Enter the Step TitleUser Should able to Enter Data in Step Title
testcases.raw: TC_05 Carousel FunctionalityVerify if user able to enter the step title 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step TitleUser Should able to Enter Data in Step Title

testcases.description: Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on cancel buttonThe step creation pop up should be closed
testcases.raw: TC_06 Carousel Functionality Verify that the cancel button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on cancel buttonThe step creation pop up should be closed

testcases.description: Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation
testcases.expected: click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen
testcases.raw: TC_07 Carousel Functionality Verify that the change step button is clickable in generic step creation 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.click on change step button Clicking on Change step should redirect to Chosse step screen

testcases.expected: Enter Data in " Instructions for Student " User Should able to Enter Data in Instructions for Student
testcases.raw: TC_08 Carousel Functionality Verify that user able to enter "Instructions for Students" 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Create Math activity 3. Click on start authoring 4. Add Generic step 5.Enter the Step Title 6.Click on next button 7.Enter Data in " Instructions for Student " User Should able to Enter Data in Instructions for Student
